title: SauroLab Hollow Earth Official Pack
description: Official Pack of the 100 Days in Hollow Earth YouTube series by SauroLab.
body: This is a survival-focused modpack centered on the Alex's Caves mod. Supporting mods such as Create: New Age and Regions Unexplored flesh out the world and offer a balance between exploration and tech. Alex's Caves generation is edited to make cave biomes significantly more common, and nuclear bombs are even more destructive.
